content:
- Added a dedicated README-content contract plus separate README workspace support, rewrote the README into three operator-only quick-start sections, and removed README-only assertions from the heavy novice runtime contract.
- Verified the new content boundary with focused runner tests, then ran the required repository gates: `make check`, `make lint`, and `make test` all passed; the default suite kept long-lane tests ignored as expected.
- Next: commit all tracked and new task/code changes, push, and quit immediately.
